captions.formal: A video clip capturing various subjects engaging in routine activities across multiple scenes.
captions.sarcastic: Witness another breathtaking display of absolutely ordinary things happening in real time.
captions.humorous_tech: Running human_activity.exe in production. The rendering engine is adequate.
captions.humorous_non_tech: Just another day in the life of stuff doing things in places.
